VLA 研究主线梳理
DualVLN：Ground Slow, Move Fast —— VLN 的“快慢系统”基础模型
WALL-OSS: 点燃 VLM 走向具身空间
Agent World Model：无限合成环境赋能智能体强化学习 (Agent World Model: Infinity Synthetic Environments for Agentic Reinforcement Learning)
AtomVLA：世界模型驱动的离线后训练，把长程任务拆成“原子步骤” (AtomVLA: Scalable Post-Training for Robotic Manipulation via Predictive Latent World Models)
因果世界建模用于机器人控制 (Causal World Modeling for Robot Control)
Ctrl-World × WorldArena：世界模型终于不只比“像不像”，而开始比“能不能真干活” (Ctrl-World & WorldArena)
DreamZero：世界动作模型即零样本策略 (World Action Models are Zero-shot Policies)
DriveDreamer-Policy：几何落地的世界 - 动作统一模型 (DriveDreamer-Policy: A Geometry-Grounded World-Action Model for Unified Generation and Planning)
EgoSim: 第一人称闭环世界模拟器 (EgoSim: Egocentric World Simulator for Embodied Interaction Generation)
GeoPT：动力学提升的几何预训练，扩展物理仿真 (GeoPT: Lifted Geometric Pre-Training for Physics Simulation)
GigaBrain-0.5M*：世界模型原生的 VLA 自我进化范式 (GigaBrain-0.5M*: World Model-Based RL for VLA)
Goal-VLA：图像生成式 VLM 作为物体中心世界模型赋能零样本机器人操作 (Goal-VLA: Image-Generative VLMs as Object-Centric World Models Empowering Zero-shot Robot Manipulation)
H-WM：分层世界模型引导的机器人任务与运动规划 (H-WM: Robotic Task and Motion Planning Guided by Hierarchical World Model)
从视频生成模型学习物理：多模态连续序列世界交互模型用于机器人操作 (Learning Physics from Pretrained Video Models: A Multimodal Continuous and Sequential World Interaction Models for Robotic Manipulation)
MIND: 世界模型记忆一致性与动作控制评估基准 (MIND: Benchmarking Memory Consistency and Action Control in World Models)
Olaf-World：面向视频世界建模的潜在动作定向 (Olaf-World: Orienting Latent Actions for Video World Modeling)
1X World Model（1XWM）：把“视频世界模型”用在人形 NEO 上
Simulation Distillation: Pretraining World Models in Simulation for Rapid Real-World Adaptation
机器人"照镜子"学会模拟自己：从单目视频到运动学自模型
视频生成模型在机器人中的应用：近 300 篇体系化综述提炼（2026）(Video Generation Models in Robotics, 2026 Survey)
VLAW：世界模型 × VLA 协同进化 (Iterative Co-Improvement of VLA Policy and World Model)
VLOA 具身世界模型：用 3D 点云轨迹打开物理认知的黑箱
VLA 将死，WAM 当立？2026 三路线综述 (Will WAM Replace VLA? A 2026 Three-Route Overview)
Wanderland：开放世界具身 AI 的几何 grounding 仿真平台 (Wanderland: Geometrically Grounded Simulation for Open-World Embodied AI)
World Action Models are Zero-shot Policies (DreamZero)
World Model 主线总纲：从 evaluator 到 planner，再到 world action model
世界模型评估机器人策略：WorldEval (World Model as Real-World Robot Policies Evaluator)
